name: Elena Marquez
bio: Elena develops integrative research programs that combine physiology, breeding, and analytical methods to improve inference across controlled and field environments.

name: Samir Haddad
bio: Samir leads multi-season experiments on salt stress response and supports HPLC method harmonization across collaborative projects.

name: Maria Okafor
bio: Maria studies how imaging-derived traits can improve interpretation of drought progression in greenhouse and field crossover studies.

name: Daniel Kim
bio: Daniel develops reproducible pigment extraction protocols and maintains chromatographic QC records for student-led analytical projects.

name: Lina Foster
bio: Lina coordinates chamber schedules, sample tracking, and routine instrument calibration across the lab’s shared facilities.
